register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your details to get started
register.consent_text: I agree to the terms and conditions of the experiment.
register.consent_intro: You are invited to participate in a longitudinal research study titled 'Longitudinal Evaluation of Digital Well-being Interventions in Pakistan'. This study is conducted by Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia (UKM) in collaboration with the Pakistan Institute of Mind Sciences (PIMS). The goal is to examine how short, daily digital writing exercises affect psychological well-being, gratitude, and resilience in Pakistani adults.
register.consent_section1_text: If you consent, you will first complete an eligibility screening and a 12-item sociodemographic questionnaire (T0). Following this, you will complete a baseline psychometric assessment. Over the next 7 days, you will log in daily to complete a short writing activity (10–15 minutes). You will also be asked to complete psychometric follow-up assessments at 1 week, 1 month, 3 months, 6 months, and 1 year post-onboarding. These follow-ups track your long-term progress and provide you with feedback charts.
register.consent_section2_text: We take your privacy and data security seriously. All responses you submit are encrypted both in transit and at rest on secure local servers. Daily automated backups are performed to prevent data loss. Any data exported for statistical research or scientific publications will be fully anonymized. Your name, email address, phone number, and other personally identifying details will never be disclosed or published.
register.consent_section3_text: Important Clinical Safety Notice: As part of our psychometric assessments, we evaluate safety and suicide risk indicators. If your responses on any psychometric survey trigger clinical threshold warnings indicating high risk, the system will automatically generate an internal support ticket. Our research team is ethically and legally obligated to reach out to you directly via phone or WhatsApp to verify your safety, check on your well-being, and connect you with qualified professional clinical resources or emergency services.
register.consent_section4_text: Your participation in this research is entirely voluntary. You have the right to refuse to answer any specific question or withdraw from the study at any time without penalty. Furthermore, you can permanently delete your account and all associated personal data from our systems through your profile settings at any time. Graduation occurs upon the completion of the 1-year follow-up.
register.consent_section5_text: If you have any questions about the research methodology, your rights as a participant, or experience technical issues while using the platform, please reach out to the Pakistan Institute of Mind Sciences (PIMS) support team at support@psycheversity.com.

profile.delete_account_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data, including submissions, assessments, and support history. This action cannot be undone.
profile.delete_account_section_description: Once you delete your account, all of your data will be permanently removed.

dashboard.no_activities: No activities scheduled for today. Check back later!

landing.title: Welcome to Psycheversity!
landing.collaboration: A research project of Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia (UKM) in collaboration with the Pakistan Institute of Mind Sciences (PIMS), Islamabad.
landing.intro_1: Psycheversity offers a free, online wellbeing program based on Positive Psychology. It has been developed at Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia (UKM) in collaboration with the Pakistan Institute of Mind Sciences (PIMS), Islamabad, for adults living in Pakistan or holding Pakistani nationality.
landing.intro_2: Positive Psychology is the scientific study of what makes life most worth living. Researchers in this field design and test simple, evidence-based activities that can help people build wellbeing, gratitude, and a sense of meaning in everyday life. This program has been developed according to that scientific tradition.
landing.intro_3: The program consists of short daily writing activities that you complete from your phone or computer, in English or Urdu, taking about 10–15 minutes a day. Your participation also supports scientific research on wellbeing in Pakistan.
landing.registration_note: Registration is open. Click "Register Now" to sign up, or sign in if you are already a participant.
